title: Fresh Vietnamese Tofu Bun Cha
description: A pungent and bouncy Vietnamese dish featuring basil and confit tomato, served in a hot pot vessel, this vegetarian friendly meal is a nostalgic treat. It is made with tofu and served with a variety of fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the tofu to the skillet and fry until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the tofu from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and saute for 1 minute.
Add the confit tomato to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and ginger.
Add the soy sauce and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the tomato mixture.
Return the tofu to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodle mixture.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a hot pot vessel.
Garnish with chopped basil and scallions.
